arts.ttl: Real Madrid managerial shortlist: Andoni Iraola's stunning work at Bournemouth sees him 'emerge' as genuine option
arts.sum: Bournemouth's Andoni Iraola is allegedly an option to replace Carlo Ancelotti as Real Madrid manager at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: How to Watch Real Madrid vs. Manchester City: Champions League Knockout Playoffs
arts.sum: Real Madrid welcome Manchester City to the Santiago Bernabéu with a one goal advantage in their Champions League playoff tie.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso left in no man's land as Real Madrid plot shock move for Andoni Iraola
arts.sum: Real Madrid have drawn up contingency plans incase Carlo Ancelotti decides to leave his post - and they are big admirers of one of the Premier League's most exciting young coaches

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED lineups: Real Madrid vs Manchester City, 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their starting lineup for the upcoming match against Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League ’s Round of 32. Real Madrid starting XI: Courtois, Valverde, Rudiger, Asencio, Mendy, Tchouameni, Ceballos, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Manchester City - Champions League: Live score and team news as Pep's side look to bounce back from late double blow and overturn first-leg deficit
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of Real Madrid vs Manchester City in the Champions League with the Citizens bidding to overturn a first-leg deficit as they chase victory at the Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Carlo Ancelotti 'could help' Los Blancos 'land £75m centre-back' this summer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly considering moving for Everton centre-back Jarrad Branthwaite during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid included Cristiano Ronaldo in their official defence of Jude Bellingham after red card

arts.ttl: Manchester City youth product in attack on Jude Bellingham ahead of match
arts.sum: Manchester City youth product Pablo Maffeo, now at Mallorca, may have stoked the fires ahead of their clash with Real Madrid in the Champions League, by hitting out at Jude Bellingham.
